scoping.selected_writer_rationale: The apparent writer procedure delegates through a linked-server EXEC to an out-of-scope external procedure. The actual data transformation logic resides entirely in the remote procedure and cannot be resolved from this project.

candidates.rationale: Direct writer procedure, but only delegates to a remote linked-server procedure. No local write logic.

errors.message: The apparent writer delegates through a linked-server EXEC to [LinkedServer].[WarehouseDb].[silver].[usp_remote_LoadProduct], so the writer cannot be resolved from this project.
